overall.description: First-person exploration of an ancient Egyptian mummification workshop in a video game (Assassin's Creed Origins). The player moves from sunlit exterior mud-brick buildings through dim interior workshop spaces where NPCs are wrapping bodies, then exits to a bright courtyard with active mummification stations and ritual preparation areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: mud-brick building entrance leading to mummification workshop

events.description: camera moves from bright exterior into dimly lit interior workshop space
camera turns slightly to reveal workers wrapping a mummy on a central table

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the workshop, observing the mummification process

notable_agents.action: worker in blue tunic carefully wrapping linen strips around a body
worker kneeling and preparing embalming materials

entered.detail: rough-hewn doorway with wooden lintel and hanging rope decorations
wooden table holding a body partially wrapped in linen strips
large terracotta storage jars lined against the exterior wall
tall shelving unit containing scrolls and small containers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins outside a mud-brick building in ancient Egypt, entering through a doorway into a dimly lit mummification workshop. Inside, workers are visible wrapping a body on a central table, with wooden shelves and clay pottery lining the walls. The camera moves forward and turns to reveal the workshop activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior mummification workshop with multiple workstations

events.description: camera circles around the central mummification table to view workers from different angles
camera approaches the exit doorway leading back to the exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: moving around the workshop interior, examining the mummification process from various angles

notable_agents.action: worker carefully adjusting linen wrappings on the mummy
elderly robed figure with gold headpiece observing the preparation process

entered.detail: raised stone slab used for body preparation and storage
decorated storage chest with hieroglyphic panels on the front
small rectangular window with wooden shutters letting in light

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the workshop interior, the camera circles around the central mummification table where workers continue wrapping the body. An elderly robed figure observes the process. The space features stone platforms, decorated chests, and small windows. The camera then approaches the exit doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with outdoor mummification station under fabric canopy

events.description: camera exits the building into bright sunlight of the sandy courtyard
camera turns to approach an outdoor mummification workstation against the wall

agents.ego_description: leaving the interior workshop and moving through the sunlit courtyard toward outdoor work areas

notable_agents.action: worker in leopard-skin vest preparing a body on an outdoor table
robed figure standing and observing the outdoor mummification process

entered.detail: large stone archway leading to other parts of the temple complex
tall palm trees visible rising above the compound walls
weathered walls with faded blue geometric paint patterns
wooden pole structure with fabric awning providing shade over work area
massive terracotta storage vessel near the wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dim interior into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a sandy courtyard with mud-brick walls decorated with geometric patterns. The camera moves past a large storage jar and approaches an outdoor mummification station shaded by a fabric canopy, where workers prepare another body on a table against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ritual preparation area with priest performing ceremonies over a body

events.description: camera slows and approaches the ritual table for close observation of tools and materials
priest raises arms in ritual gesture over the prepared body on the slab

agents.ego_description: approaching the ritual station to closely observe the priest and detailed mummification tools

notable_agents.action: priest in green robe and leopard skin performing ritual gestures and prayers over the body
assistant kneeling and arranging ritual materials against the wall

entered.detail: wooden table covered with embalming tools, herbs, linen, and pottery
four large decorated jars for storing organs during mummification
bronze hooks, knives, and linen strips laid out on the preparation table
stone slab holding a body being prepared for mummification ritual

segments.scene_description: The camera slows to approach a detailed ritual preparation area under a canopy. A wooden table holds various embalming tools, herbs, and four canopic jars. A priest in ceremonial robes performs ritual gestures over a body lying on a stone preparation slab, while an assistant arranges materials nearby. The scene focuses on the intricate details of the mummification craft.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright exterior of a mud-brick complex into a dim mummification workshop before emerging back into a sunlit courtyard. It begins by passing through a doorway into a shadowed interior where workers wrap a body on a central table surrounded by wooden shelves and clay pottery. As the camera circles the mummification table, it reveals an elderly robed figure observing the process amidst stone platforms and decorated chests before turning toward the exit. The scene then shifts from the dim interior back into blinding sunlight, opening into a sandy courtyard with geometric patterns on the walls. Finally, the camera moves past a large storage jar toward an outdoor mummification station shaded by a fabric canopy where another body is being prepared.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that slows to focus on the meticulous details of a ritual preparation area. It begins by approaching a shaded space under a canopy, where the environment shifts from open movement to a concentrated study of the mummification craft. As the camera draws closer, the view settles on a wooden table laden with embalming tools, herbs, and four canopic jars. The scene then centers on a priest in ceremonial robes performing ritual gestures over a body on a stone slab, while an assistant arranges materials nearby to complete the scene of ancient preparation.
